zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd ap Hywel於大約1320年出生在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾利安德素爾時，他的父親Hywel Ap Hywel7歲，母親Alys verch Llewelyn20歲。他與Elsbeth verch Dafydd在威爾士結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年在威爾士布雷康史爾利阿利享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dafydd ap Hywel于大约1320年出生在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾利安德素爾时，他的父亲Hywel Ap Hywel7岁，母亲Alys verch Llewelyn20岁。他与Elsbeth verch Dafydd在威尔士结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1412年在威尔士布雷康史爾利阿利享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd ap Hywel was born about 1320, in Llandyssul, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Hywel Ap Hywel, was 7 and his mother, Alys verch Llewelyn, was 20. He married Elsbeth verch Dafydd in Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1412, in Llanelly, Breconshire, Wales, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dafydd ap Hywel est né environ 1320, à Llandyssul, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hywel Ap Hywel, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Alys verch Llewelyn, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elsbeth verch Dafydd à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1412, à Llanelly, Breconshire, Galles, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dafydd ap Hywel um 1320 in Llandyssul, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel Ap Hywel 7 und seine Mutter Alys verch Llewelyn 20. Er hat in Wales Elsbeth verch Dafydd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1412 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Llanelly, Breconshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd ap Hywel è nato il circa 1320 nel Llandyssul, Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hywel Ap Hywel, aveva 7 anni e il suo madre, Alys verch Llewelyn, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elsbeth verch Dafydd nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1412, nel Llanelly, Breconshire, Galles, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Hywelが約1320年にイギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアランディスルで生まれた時，父Hywel Ap Hywelは7歳，母Alys verch Llewelynは20歳であった。ウェールズでElsbeth verch Dafyddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアランエリーで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Hywel(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 랜디설에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel Ap Hywel(은)는 7세였고, 그의 어머니 Alys verch Llewelyn(은)는 20세였다. 그는 웨일스에서 Elsbeth verch Dafydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 웨일스 브레콘실르 랜리에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd ap Hywel nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Llandyssul, Cardiganshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hywel Ap Hywel, tinha 7 anos e sua mãe, Alys verch Llewelyn, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elsbeth verch Dafydd em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1412, em Llanelly, Breconshire, Gales, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd ap Hywel родился около 1320 г. в местности лландиссул, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hywel Ap Hywel было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Alys verch Llewelyn, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elsbeth verch Dafydd в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1412 г. в местности лланелли, брекуншир, Уэльс в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dafydd ap Hywel nació aproximadamente 1320, en Llandyssul, Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Hywel Ap Hywel, tenía 7 años y su mamá, Alys verch Llewelyn, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elsbeth verch Dafydd en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1412, en Llanelly, Breconshire, Gales, a la edad de 93 años.
